stages.objective: Observe full trace evidence for extended filesystem scenario.
stages.goal: Identify all required audit events before submission.
stages.theory_detail: Auditability requires matching correctness claims to concrete trace evidence.

hints.concept: Trace audit connects mechanism to correctness.
hints.explicit: Run scenario and mark each required event as it appears.

stages.objective: Diagnose audit gaps and invariant outcomes.
stages.goal: Pass fs_ok, completion, and trace coverage checks together.

hints.concept: One missing audit event can invalidate correctness argument.
hints.explicit: Reset, rerun, and verify checklist item-by-item before submit.

stages.objective: Apply bounded tuning and preserve full audit pass state.
stages.goal: Keep all audit validators passing after allowed edits.

hints.concept: Optimization is acceptable only if correctness evidence remains complete.
hints.explicit: Apply one tuning change, rerun full scenario, and verify every validator.
